title: Author and clinical/advocate-review ≥25 source terms (seed glossary)
context: oncology-glossary-multilingual produces patient-facing oncology/clinical-trial definitions at riskTier HIGH. This task produces the core reviewed source-language seed glossary of at least 25 terms, each with clinical and patient-advocate sign-off, provenance, and a not-medical-advice notice. Requires draft-001 (drafts in review) and reviewers-002 (secured reviewers) as prerequisites.
objective: Author at least 25 oncology/clinical-trial source definitions at or below grade-8 reading level, grounded in allow-listed sources, and obtain both clinical and patient-advocate sign-off on each entry per the review checklists and handoff template. Resolve all agent uncertainty flags before sign-off.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 25 source terms are authored in glossary/source/<term-id>.yaml, each with: termId, term, definition (at or below grade 8), notMedicalAdvice:true, sourceRefs (allow-listed source), safetyLoad classification, readingLevelScore, and aliases where applicable

Each term has both clinicalSignoff (credentialed oncology reviewer per review-001) and advocateSignoff (patient advocate per review-002) recorded in the review artifact; an entry missing either remains blocked and is not counted toward the 25
All agent uncertainty flags are resolved or accepted-as-is with reasoning before sign-off; no unresolved flags remain on signed-off entries
No advice, dosing, diagnostic, or prognostic content appears in any entry (confirmed by both clinical and advocate review)
License/provenance check (license-001) is green for every entry: source allow-listed and permitted, attribution present, provenance complete, notMedicalAdvice:true, output license correct
Source sign-off pass rate is reportable once denominator reaches at least 10 entries
output: At least 25 reviewed and signed-off source glossary entries in glossary/source/<term-id>.yaml with completed review artifacts
